headline: Is Wells Fargo & Company (WFC) one of Goldman Sachs Top Bank Stocks Despite Price Target Cut?
summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) is one of Goldman Sachs top bank stocks to buy. On April 15, Keefe Bruyette & Woods reiterated a Market Perform rating on Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) but cut the price target to $98 from $101. The price target cut was due to Wells Fargo’s first-quarter net interest income […]

headline: 'Spending Fatigue' Appears in Debit, Credit Card Data
summary: Daily credit and debit card spending have sharply dropped--and the weakness is likely to show up in the Census Bureau's April retail and food services sales data.  Excluding gasoline expenses, card spending has turned nearly flat year-over-year in recent weeks, according to a chart published by Wells Fargo on Monday evening.  Spending was up single digits year-over-year in the weeks prior.

headline: Wells Fargo & Company Announces Common Stock Dividend
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026--Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) today announced its board of directors approved a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.45 per share, payable June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record on May 8, 2026.

headline: Wall Street Sees Big Upside for Wells Fargo—Jim Cramer Saw It at $33
summary: Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) stock was last seen changing hands at $80.56 per share, with Wall Street’s average price target up at $96.65. That leaves nearly 20% implied upside between where the bank trades and where analysts think it belongs. The country’s fourth-largest bank has spent the past year as one of the more interesting ... headline: Varonis Systems (VRNS) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of data security company Varonis Systems (NASDAQ:VRNS) jumped 1.2% in the afternoon session after several analysts expressed positive views on the company ahead of its first-quarter earnings report.
